institution.name: Swedish Institute a College of Health Sciences

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Swedish Institute a College of Health Sciences fell 55% between 2021 and 2024 (35.9% → 16.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Swedish Institute a College of Health Sciences rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.3k → $9.6k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Swedish Institute a College of Health Sciences are 11% below 6-year earnings ($33.2k → $29.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Swedish Institute a College of Health Sciences fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
